codeReview.summary: The commit adds a custom `/recipes/[id]/not-found` page and substantial component-level tests, but it does not fully verify several required cross-flow behaviors in the feature contract (notably persistence across refresh/session and true deleted-URL behavior after delete).

issues.description: The "Data Persistence Across Operations" section only renders in-memory arrays and search UI; it does not validate required persistence behaviors (refresh, sign-out/sign-in, concurrency stability) expected by the feature (`features.json` expectedBehavior and VAL-CROSS-036/037/038/039).

The delete-flow suite claims "Detail Returns 404" but does not exercise navigation to `/recipes/[deleted-id]` after deletion to verify actual 404/redirect behavior. Current assertions only check delete action invocation, redirect push, and list rendering.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` skill requires agent-browser verification for authenticated flows, but this mission/environment has a known Clerk Cloudflare challenge in headless mode; workers fall back to partial checks yet still mark procedure followed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:63-72 requires agent-browser checks; .factory/library/user-testing.md:35 documents headless Clerk auth blockage; transcript skeleton (/tmp/conversion-cross-flows-skeleton.md:693) records fallback due Cloudflare.

summary: Fail: implementation improves coverage and 404 UX, but required persistence/authenticated cross-flow verification remains incomplete and the deleted-recipe URL behavior is not validated end-to-end.
